basic_details.job_title: NCRA Administrative Officer E Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 1 Post at TIFR Pune
basic_details.short_information: The National Centre for Radio Astrophysics (NCRA), Tata Institute of Fundamental Research, Pune has released Recruitment Advertisement No. 2026/07 for the post of Administrative Officer-E. There is 1 vacancy (Unreserved), headquartered at Pune. The last date to apply online is 30 June 2026, with age and experience reckoned as on 1 January 2026. The monthly emolument is ₹1,61,240 (TME) at Pay Level 12, Pay Stage 01.

qualification.details: While not mandatory, the following experience will strengthen a candidate's application: | Experience in leading a team of approximately 10 junior colleagues. Detailed working knowledge of Finance, Budget, Government e-Marketplace (GeM), General Financial Rules (GFR), and Legal matters.

salary_details.details: Administrative Officer-E is a senior-level position with a competitive pay package under the Central Government pay matrix. The total monthly emolument figure already factors in all applicable allowances at the time of advertisement. | Candidates may also be required to work in shifts, beyond standard office hours, and on Saturdays, Sundays, and public holidays as per the operational requirements of the Centre.

selection_process: The selection procedure for this post is based on qualifications

and performance in a formal recruitment process. Merely meeting the essential and desirable qualifications does not guarantee a call for the recruitment process - NCRA reserves the right to shortlist candidates based on qualifications and experience.

Application Submission - Submit online or offline application before 30 June 2026. Screening / Shortlisting - NCRA reviews applications and shortlists based on qualifications and experience. Not all eligible candidates are necessarily called. Recruitment Process - Shortlisted candidates are called for the formal selection stage (written test
or a combination - refer to the official NCRA website for exact format details). Final Selection - Merit-based final selection from candidates who appear in the recruitment process.
NCRA also reserves the right not to fill the post even after advertising it. Any form of canvassing or lobbying will result in immediate disqualification.
how_to_apply: Applications can be submitted either online (preferred) or by post. The online route is strongly encouraged by NCRA for faster and error-free submission.
Visit the official application portal: https://tinyurl.com/ncrajob-2026
Register and fill in the application form carefully.
Upload all required documents (certificates, experience letters, etc.).
Submit before 30 June 2026. Applications received after the deadline will not be considered.
Offline Application (For those unable to apply online):
Download the prescribed application format from the official website.
Fill in all required details accurately.
Place the completed form in a sealed envelope.
Write the post name - "Administrative Officer-E" - on the outside of the envelope.
Post it to: Administrative Officer-D (Establishment), NCRA-TIFR, Post Bag 3, Ganeshkhind, Savitribai Phule Pune University Campus, Pune - 411007.
Ensure it reaches before 30 June 2026 - late postal applications will not be considered.
For technical difficulties with the online form, email: [email protected]

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NCRA Administrative Officer E Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application - both online and by post - is 30 June 2026. Applications received after this date in any mode will not be considered.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are there in NCRA AO-E Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There is 1 vacancy for the post of Administrative Officer-E. The post is in the Unreserved (UR) category and is headquartered at Pune.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for NCRA Administrative Officer-E?
faq.answer: The Total Monthly Emolument (TME) is ₹1,61,240 at Pay Level 12, Pay Stage 01 under the Central Government pay matrix.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must either hold a Post Graduate degree in Management/Administration with 60% marks, or a Graduate degree with 60% marks along with a Diploma/Degree/Certificate in Management or Administration - both from a recognised university or institute.

faq.question: Q5. What experience is required for NCRA AO-E 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates need either 10 years of experience at Level 9 or 7 years of experience at Level 10 or higher (with equivalent TME) as on 1 January 2026.

faq.question: Q6. What is the maximum age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit is 50 years, reckoned as on 1 January 2026. Age relaxation is applicable as per Government of India rules for eligible categories.
